scripts.test:all: bun test test/classify-error.test.ts && bun test/e2e-routing.ts && bun test/e2e-help.ts && bun test/e2e.ts
scripts.build:local: cd ../opencode && bun run build --single && mkdir -p ../cz-cli/dist && cp dist/cz-cli-darwin-arm64/bin/cz-cli ../cz-cli/dist/cz-cli && codesign --sign - ../cz-cli/dist/cz-cli
scripts.test:ci: bun run build:local && CZ_CLI_BIN=./dist/cz-cli bun run test:all
